revision_requests: Clarify how the cancellation eligibility will be determined within the booking model. Are there specific conditions or states for cancellation?
Specify what kinds of security checks will be implemented to prevent unauthorized cancellation requests.
Outline the testing framework that will be used to run unit and integration tests. Will any specific tools or libraries be utilized?
Ensure that the error handling approach is documented. What types of errors are anticipated, and how should they be logged or reported?
